parameters.query:
SELECT
  m.file_id              AS id,
  m.file_id,
  m.title,
  m.code,
  m.url,
  m.source,
  m.mime_type,
  m.category_id,
  c.code  AS category_code,
  c.name  AS category_name,
  COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zanaflex_documents d WHERE d.metadata->>'file_id' = m.file_id), 0) AS chunk_count,
  m.created_at,
  m.updated_at AS last_indexed_at
FROM zanaflex_document_metadata m
LEFT JOIN zanaflex_document_categories c ON c.id = m.category_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(m.code, m.title, m.file_id);

WITH purged AS (
  DELETE FROM zanaflex_documents
   WHERE metadata->>'file_id' = '{{ $json.fileId }}'
   RETURNING 1
), purged_rows AS (
  DELETE FROM zanaflex_document_rows
   WHERE dataset_id = '{{ $json.fileId }}'
   RETURNING 1
)
DELETE FROM zanaflex_document_metadata
 WHERE file_id = '{{ $json.fileId }}'
RETURNING file_id AS deleted_file_id;

SELECT zanaflex_rag_upsert_metadata(
  p_file_id       => '{{ $json.file_id }}',
  p_title         => '{{ ($json.title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  p_code          => {{ $json.code         ? "'" + String($json.code).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  p_url           => {{ $json.url          ? "'" + String($json.url).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  p_source        => '{{ ($json.source || 'upload').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  p_mime_type     => {{ $json.mime_type    ? "'" + String($json.mime_type).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  p_schema        => {{ $json.schema       ? "'" + String($json.schema).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" : 'NULL' }},
  p_category_id   => {{ $json.category_id  ? "'" + String($json.category_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }},
  p_category_code => {{ $json.category_code ? "'" + String($json.category_code).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}
) AS resolved_category;

parameters.content:
## Zanaflex — RAG Admin API

Quatro webhooks usados pelo painel **Documentos** do front-end:

| Método | Path | O que faz |
|---|---|---|
| GET | `/zanaflex-rag-docs` | Lista todos os documentos do RAG com categoria + contagem de chunks |
| POST | `/zanaflex-rag-doc-delete` | Remove um documento (chunks + rows + metadata) por `file_id` |
| POST | `/zanaflex-rag-purge-all` | TRUNCATE em `zanaflex_documents`, `_document_rows`, `_document_metadata` |
| POST | `/zanaflex-rag-upsert` | Insere/atualiza `zanaflex_document_metadata` via RPC `zanaflex_rag_upsert_metadata()` |

DB layer já existe nas migrations 008/009 (`zanaflex_rag_upsert_metadata`, `zanaflex_rag_purge_file`, etc.). Aqui usamos SQL direto via postgres node para evitar o guard `zanaflex_is_admin()` — a autorização é feita no front via Supabase Auth.
